## Academic Appointments

```{r}
# Industry-flavoured detail lines: emphasise tools, techniques, and delivered
# artefacts rather than the academic framing used in _appointments.qmd.
# CNIO intentionally has no detail yet (role recently started).
emp_details <- list(
  # ISGlobal — Postdoctoral Researcher (Rakislova Lab)
  "31778472" = paste(
    "Built reproducible whole-exome sequencing pipelines (Bash, R, SLURM)",
    "for cancer genomics: QC, alignment, multi-caller somatic variant",
    "calling, and copy-number analysis; authored the squamr R package."
  ),
  # PhD Student — Childhood and Environment
  "15100551" = paste(
    "Developed reproducible causal-inference and multi-omics pipelines in",
    "R and Python on HPC (parametric g-formula, network analysis);",
    "released open-source code for three first-author papers."
  )
)

render_affiliations(cv_data$employments, details = emp_details)
```
